summary: Terrible sound quality – playback runs too fast and sounds like a low‑fidelity radio capture; no performance details were noted.
review: All three reviewers focus on the recording’s severe flaws, describing it as runaway in speed and sounding like an off‑air FM broadcast. The setlist is called “nice,” but no musical highlights are mentioned, and a better‐sounding CM version is recommended instead.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently low star ratings (0‑2) and unanimous criticism of the audio; no positive comments about the performance to offset the poor recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Playback runs too fast, likely due to tape speed issues or a radio‑capture source; overall sound is muddy and unintelligible.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers did not comment on the musical flow; they only noted the set list was nice but gave no performance evaluation.
